MUST: ClassSession MUST tener FK a User para tutor limitado a user_type='tutor' via limit_choices_to (RF-005)
ClassSession MUST tener FK a User para client limitado a user_type='client' via limit_choices_to (RF-005)
ClassSession status MUST usar choices predefinidos: pending, confirmed, completed, cancelled (RF-005-A)
ClassSession duration MUST validar mínimo 60 y máximo 180 minutos en clean() (RF-005-B)
ClassSession meeting_platform MUST usar choices predefinidos: google_meet, zoom, custom (RF-006-A)
ClassSession scheduled_date y scheduled_time MUST usar timezone UTC-5 (RF-006-B)
ClassSession MUST incluir verbose_name y verbose_name_plural en Meta (RNF-004)
ClassSession on_delete para tutor FK MUST ser CASCADE o PROTECT — MUST NOT ser SET_NULL (RNF-013)
ClassSession on_delete para client FK MUST ser CASCADE o PROTECT — MUST NOT ser SET_NULL (RNF-013)
MUST_NOT: ClassSession tutor FK MUST NOT referenciar usuarios con user_type != 'tutor' (RF-005)
ClassSession duration MUST NOT aceptar valores fuera de 60-180 minutos (RF-005-B)
ClassSession MUST NOT permitir double-booking para el mismo tutor (RF-006-C)

MUST: ClassSessionManager MUST implementar get_tutor_sessions(tutor, status=None) con select_related (RNF-001)
ClassSessionManager MUST implementar get_client_sessions(client, status=None) con select_related (RNF-001)
Todas las querysets MUST encadenar .select_related('tutor__tutor_profile', 'client__client_profile') (RNF-001)
ClassSessionManager MUST ser el default manager del modelo ClassSession (RNF-004)
MUST_NOT: Query logic de sesiones MUST NOT implementarse inline en views (RNF-004)

MUST: CountryConfig MUST tener campo country_code CharField(max_length=2) único — ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 (RF-001-C)
CountryConfig MUST tener campo country_name CharField(max_length=100) (RF-001-C)
CountryConfig MUST tener campo active BooleanField default=True (RF-013-A)
CountryConfig MUST tener campo geo_restricted BooleanField default=False (RF-013-B)
CountryConfig MUST tener campos created_at y updated_at con auto_now (RNF-004)
CountryConfig MUST incluir verbose_name='País' y verbose_name_plural='Países' en Meta (RNF-004)
CountryConfig MUST registrarse en Django admin con list_display=['country_code', 'country_name', 'active', 'geo_restricted'] y list_editable=['active', 'geo_restricted'] (RF-013-A, RF-013-B)
CountryConfig country_code MUST ser el identificador usado por middleware para routing (RF-001-C)
MUST_NOT: CountryConfig MUST NOT tener lógica de negocio inline — MUST ser modelo de datos puro (RNF-004)

MUST: ServiceArea MUST tener FK a CountryConfig con on_delete=CASCADE (RF-007-A)
ServiceArea MUST tener campo city_name CharField único dentro de su CountryConfig (RF-007)
ServiceArea MUST tener campo activo BooleanField default=True (RF-007)
ServiceArea MUST tener campo area para polígono PostGIS (RF-007-C)
ServiceArea MUST tener campos created_at y updated_at con auto_now (RNF-004)
ServiceArea MUST incluir verbose_name y verbose_name_plural en Meta (RNF-004)
ServiceArea MUST ser REQUERIDA solo cuando su CountryConfig.geo_restricted=True (RF-007-B)
ServiceArea verificación espacial MUST usar SQL raw ST_Contains — MUST NOT depender de GIS_AVAILABLE (RF-007-C)
ServiceArea MUST ser considerada main_only en latam-mvp — geo_restricted=False para todos los países elimina la necesidad de polígonos (RF-001-A)
MUST_NOT: ServiceArea MUST NOT ser requerida para países con geo_restricted=False (RF-007-B)
ServiceArea city_name MUST NOT duplicarse dentro del mismo CountryConfig (RF-007)

MUST: TutorLead MUST almacenar name, email, subject fields (RF-009)
TutorLead MUST mantener expiration exactamente 7 días desde created_at (RF-009-A)
TutorLead MUST incluir verbose_name y verbose_name_plural en Meta (RNF-004)
MUST_NOT: TutorLead expiration MUST NOT exceder 7 días (RF-009-A)

MUST: NotificacionExpansion MUST almacenar email, ciudad_deseada, provincia_deseada, ip_address (RF-008-A, RF-008-B)
NotificacionExpansion MUST tener created_at auto_now_add (RNF-004)
NotificacionExpansion MUST incluir verbose_name y verbose_name_plural en Meta (RNF-004)
MUST_NOT: NotificacionExpansion MUST NOT exponer ip_address en APIs públicas (RNF-008)

MUST: filter_by_search() MUST search in subjects_taught__name using icontains (RF-016-C)
filter_by_search() MUST also search in user__name using icontains (RF-016-C)
filter_by_search() MUST use .distinct() after subjects filter to avoid duplicates (RNF-001)
MUST_NOT: filter_by_search() MUST NOT rely exclusively on subjects legacy field for search (RF-016-C)
